channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Tuesday, April 14
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 01:21 AM (1.532 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 08:25 AM (0.172 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: Vrbl 7 G 18 mph
